caption: A woman with dark, shoulder-length hair and glasses is centered against a plain black background. She wears a light green, long-sleeved tunic adorned with small floral patterns and a dark beaded necklace. A small clip-on microphone is attached to the neckline of her garment. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking, and her facial expressions and mouth movements shift as she talks. A small logo with the text "NPTEL" is visible in the lower-left corner of the scene. The lighting is consistent, focusing on her upper body as she communicates directly toward the camera. There are no other people or objects in the scene, and the background remains static as only her head and facial features move to convey her speech.
